title: Garlicy Dumplings and Noodles
description: Juicy dumplings and kid-friendly rice noodles in a flavorful garlic sauce make this dish perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Ground Lamb Meat
ingredients.notes: Use beef or chicken if preferred.

instructions: Chop the garlic and onion finely.
Heat oil in a pan, add chopped onions and cook until translucent.
Add minced garlic and fry for about 2 minutes on medium heat.
Add tomato paste and stir until it forms a syrup-like consistency.
Gradually add meat to the sauce while breaking into smaller pieces. Cook until meat is almost done.
Stir in salt and palm sugar/honey, taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Pour mixture over rice noodles or use them as wrappers for dumplings.
Cook dumplings by steaming or frying (if using wrappers) until golden brown on the outside.
